In game Overview:
*Lisa Minci is a supporting heroic playable character in the Chinese fantasy roleplaying game Genshin Impact. She is the Head librarian of the Knights of Favonius and an alumna of Sumeru Academia. Serene and wise, she relies on electric magic in combat and takes her job as a librarian incredibly seriously.
